Description: STM32H743 flight controller – ArduPlane compatible – integrated baro OSD BEC
Notes: H743 preferred over F405 for processing headroom; F405-WING also compatible at lower cost

Description: ARM Cortex-A53 × 4 – 512MB RAM – CSI-2 camera interface – Wi-Fi
Notes: Solder 40-pin header. Use Lite OS image (headless).

Description: Sony IMX708 – 102° FOV – 12MP – CSI-2 – 1080p30
Notes: NOSE-MOUNTED — this is the nose of the pod. Mount facing forward/downward direction of travel.

Description: Concurrent GNSS GPS+GLO+GAL – 10 Hz – UART – patch antenna
Notes: Mount inside nose section above camera, patch antenna must face sky

Description: 6-axis IMU – 32kHz ODR – SPI – low-noise – ±2000dps gyro
Notes: Often integrated in FC — check if F405/H743 variant includes it. Buy separately only if FC IMU is insufficient.

Description: High-precision barometer – I2C/SPI – ±0.5hPa – 200Hz ODR
Notes: Usually integrated in FC. Buy separately if FC lacks baro or for redundancy.

Description: Bidirectional MAVLink – 100mW – UART – up to 3km LOS – pair
Notes: Pair = 1 for pod, 1 for GCS laptop. Use 433MHz if 915 is not legal in your country.

Description: ExpressLRS 2.4GHz – SBUS output – <1ms latency – >1km range
Notes: Requires ELRS-compatible TX. Alternatively use FrSky XM+ with FrSky TX.

Description: Digital 9g – 2.0 kg·cm – 0.09s/60° – 4.8–6V – metal gear
Notes: 4 pieces needed — one per canard fin. Digital essential for hold torque and precision.

Description: Same as fins — used for carrier aircraft wing latch release
Notes: Mounted on CARRIER AIRCRAFT wing hardpoint. Pulls retention pin to release pod.
Mounted in mid-body for CG. Adjust position fore/aft to tune CG to 28% body length from nose.

Description: 5V – 2.2A – 98% efficient – 4–38V input – compact
Notes: Powers FC + RPi Zero + GPS + sensors. Separate from servo BEC to isolate noise.

Description: 5V – 2.2A – 98% efficient – 4–38V input – compact
Notes: Powers all 5 servos. Separate BEC mandatory — servo transients destroy FC/Pi if shared.

Description: XT30 gold plated battery connectors
Notes: For battery leads and power distribution.

Description: CF tube – 80mm OD 76mm ID – 320mm length – plain weave
Notes: Cut to 320mm. Sand ends smooth. Main pod fuselage.

Description: 1.75mm PETG – 1kg spool – for all 3D printed structural parts
Notes: Use PETG not PLA — better impact resistance and heat tolerance. 0.5kg estimate for all parts.

Description: M3 × 6/8/10/12/16mm bolts + nuts + washers stainless
Notes: For servo mounts fin mounts and avionics tray.

Description: M4 bolts for wing saddle mounting
Notes: Wing mount attachment bolts.

Description: Steel music wire for fin servo pushrods
Notes: Cut to length. Z-bend each end with pliers.

Description: Pushrod end connectors for servo horns and fin horns
Notes: 2 per fin linkage × 4 fins = 8 total.

Description: Neoprene foam for IMU isolation mount
Notes: Cut to size under FC/IMU mount to isolate vibration.

Description: Nylon standoffs for FC and Pi mounting
Notes: Non-conductive. Do not use metal under FC — RF interference.

Description: Flexible silicone wire for all signal and power connections
Notes: Use 22AWG for high-current servo power rails.

Description: Micro connectors for sensor connections (GPS / IMU / Baro)
Notes: For clean modular wiring.

Description: Male-female servo extension cables
Notes: Run from FC servo outputs to fin servos.

Description: Two-part structural epoxy for bonding 3D prints to CF tube
Notes: Do NOT use 5-minute epoxy for structural bonds. 30-min gives proper cure time.

Description: Medium-strength thread locker for all servo and mount screws
Notes: Apply to all servo mount M3 screws. Critical — vibration will loosen screws in flight.

Description: Cosmetic finish for printed parts and CF tube
Notes: Optional but reduces visual signature during testing.

Description: Red short-pile carpet as optical target marker
Notes: Cut to exactly 1m² for known apparent size calculations.

Description: High-density EVA or polyurethane foam cushion to absorb nose impact
Notes: Place ON TOP of red carpet. Pod impacts nose-first onto cushion. Min 30cm thick. High-density (firm) preferred.

Description: PWM servo tester for calibration and verification
Notes: Essential for zeroing all 4 fin servos before first flight.

Description: Balance charger compatible with 3S LiPo
Notes: Required for safe LiPo management.

Description: TOTAL COMPONENT COST (excl. tools and carrier aircraft):
NOTE: Carrier aircraft and RC transmitter/receiver pair not included in this BOM
NOTE: GCS laptop and Mission Planner software (free) not included
